checks.name: schema_completeness
checks.detail: All required payload fields present. Has customSections for alarm_severity_matrix, cost_thresholds, and weekly_report_structure providing rich context.

checks.name: flow_integrity
checks.detail: 3 flows (Alarm Monitoring, Cost Anomaly, Weekly Report) all have connected graphs with start/end/decision/error nodes. Error handling nodes included in flows.

checks.name: trigger_validity
checks.detail: Polling trigger has interval_seconds:120. Schedule trigger has valid cron '0 9 * * 1'. Both match prompt workflow.

checks.name: connector_role_alignment
checks.detail: aws->cloud_infra, slack->chat_messaging, jira->project_tracking all valid roles in connectorRoles.ts

checks.name: adoption_question_fitness
checks.detail: 6 adoption_questions added: aws_region, slack_incidents_channel, slack_alerts_channel, jira_project_key, cost_anomaly_threshold, cost_manual_review

checks.name: default_value_coverage
checks.detail: AWS region has default us-east-1. Jira domain/email/project_key all required. All connector fields properly documented.

checks.name: prompt_quality
checks.detail: Identity: 63 words. Instructions: ~1200 words with detailed polling loop, cost anomaly detection, and weekly report sections. Tool guidance with AWS/Slack/Jira API specifics. 3 examples. Comprehensive error handling.

checks.name: safety_scan
checks.detail: 0 critical. Manual review for cost spikes >50%. No auto-remediation without human confirmation.

dimensions.name: Prompt Completeness
dimensions.rationale: Identity 63 words. Instructions ~1200 words covering core monitoring loop, cost anomaly detection, and weekly report. Custom sections add alarm severity matrix, cost thresholds, and report structure template. 3 examples with realistic numbers. Comprehensive error handling.

dimensions.name: Tool-Prompt Alignment
dimensions.rationale: http_request, file_read, file_write all documented. AWS DescribeAlarms, GetCostAndUsage, Slack chat.postMessage, Jira issue creation all covered. Minor: AWS Signature V4 signing is mentioned but implementation details are complex for an LLM.

dimensions.name: Trigger Coherence
dimensions.rationale: Polling every 120s matches the 'every 2 minutes' requirement. Weekly Monday 9AM schedule matches report requirement. Both triggers well-documented.

dimensions.name: Connector Coverage
dimensions.rationale: AWS CloudWatch, Slack, Jira all have full connector definitions. Credential fields include region, API tokens, project keys. Setup instructions are thorough.

dimensions.name: Memory Design
dimensions.rationale: Excellent state management: alarm_tracker.json, cost_baselines.json, slack_queue.json, jira_queue.json, agent_health.json, weekly reports. Self-diagnostics tracking via agent_health.json is a standout feature.

dimensions.name: Error Handling
dimensions.rationale: Per-service failure strategy with AWS throttling backoff, Slack fallback channels, Jira queue for retries. State file corruption recovery. Resilience principle: never let one failure block the whole loop.

dimensions.name: Use Case Fidelity
dimensions.rationale: All 3 flows match prompt: alarm monitoring with severity routing and Jira escalation, cost anomaly with tiered alerting, weekly report with multi-source data gathering.

dimensions.name: Value Clarity
dimensions.rationale: Replaces 4 workflows (alarm-to-Slack, alarm-to-Jira, cost-anomaly, weekly-report). Clear business outcomes: faster alarm response, cost visibility, proactive capacity planning.

dimensions.name: Execution Feasibility
dimensions.rationale: AWS CloudWatch and Cost Explorer APIs are standard. Jira and Slack APIs stable. Main concern: AWS Signature V4 signing via http_request is complex and may require platform-level support rather than LLM-generated signatures.

dimensions.name: Differentiation
dimensions.rationale: Strong: alarm correlation into incidents, severity-based routing, persistence tracking with escalation timers, cost anomaly trend detection, and actionable weekly reports with recommendations. Far beyond simple alarm forwarding.

dimensions.name: Variable Necessity
dimensions.rationale: No template variables. Key configs handled via connector fields and adoption_questions. Could benefit from configurable alarm persistence thresholds and cost ceiling variables.

dimensions.name: Default Quality
dimensions.rationale: AWS region defaults to us-east-1. Slack channels have sensible defaults. But AWS credentials, Jira domain/project, and account email must all be configured manually. Not zero-config.

issues: No adoption_questions — AWS region, Slack channels, Jira project, cost thresholds should be asked
AWS Signature V4 signing via http_request may be infeasible without platform support
Polling trigger uses interval_seconds (120) rather than cron format — TuneStep expects interval field for polling type

template: Added 6 adoption_questions: aws_region, slack_incidents_channel, slack_alerts_channel, jira_project_key, cost_anomaly_threshold, cost_manual_review
